name: Grave Caller
tips: Grave Caller's activated ability costs 0 mana — you can buff a target's attack by your Dark Matter pool every turn for free.

Grave Caller is a Mage Undead — a [[Dark Mage]] (composite tribes count since 2026-07-10): he counts toward Dark Matter gains, receives Dark Mage buffs, and grants +1 Dark Matter on summon. He can be summoned via Reanimated Bones transform (3 mana), which also fires his summon grant.
Use the buff on your biggest threat each turn. At a 5-point pool, buffing a Giant Rat or Ratchanter with +5🗡️ per turn snowballs quickly.

At range 1, Grave Caller can attack from the second row while staying protected. Alternate between attacking and its 0-cost buff — each counts as your one action for the turn, so pick whichever contributes more that turn.
Grave Caller is deckable (2026-07-11) — run him directly at 4 mana, or cheat him out early via Reanimated Bones (1+3 = 4 mana split across turns, and the transform fires his summon grant).
rulings: The activated ability is a single-target BUFF_ATTACK with scale_with=dark_matter and amount=0. The target gains bonus 🗡️ equal to YOUR Dark Matter pool (a player resource — pool redesign 2026-07). Reading the pool does not consume it.
At pool = 0, the ability executes cleanly but the +🗡️ is 0 — grow the pool with Shady Trade Deal / Dark Matter Stash first.
Grave Caller IS a [[Dark Mage]] (Mage Undead — composite tribes count since 2026-07-10). Per-Dark-Mage gains count him and Dark-Mage-targeted buffs include him.
ACTIVATE_ABILITY counts as your one action for the turn — you cannot activate AND attack in the same turn.
Target can be any minion on the board — ally or enemy (picking an enemy is almost never useful, but legal).
